name: woyeah-wechat-oa-reader
description: WeChat Official Account and Knowledge Planet (知识星球) content reader plugin marketplace

plugins.name: wechat-oa-reader
plugins.description: Read and fetch content from WeChat Official Accounts, Knowledge Planet (知识星球/zsxq), Weibo (微博), and 巨潮资讯 (cninfo) — search accounts/companies, list articles & A-share periodic reports, fetch full content, and download 年报/半年报/季报 directly from Claude Code
